titleStmt.title: SII 18.152: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 152. (B.K. No. 34 of 1932-33.) DĒVĪHOSŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in the temple of Banaśaṅkari.

summary.p: This inscription, which refers itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalla, is dated in the 10th year of his reign, Vibhava, Pushya Amāvāsyā, Sunday Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, solar eclipse. The details are very irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1149, January 11, which was a Tuesday. But on that day there was neither Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, nor solar eclipse.

It records a grant of land made for the offerings and worship of the goddess Māḷachidēvi (of Dēvīhosūr) by Daṇḍanāyaka Recharasa who was governing Banavase Twelve-thousand from Baḷḷigrāme. He is stated to have come to the temple to fulfil a vow (harake). The agrahāra Deyvada-Hosavūr and the one-thousand Mahājanas of that place are highly praised. Kaliyamarasa of the Khachara family and Dēvadhara Daṇḍanayaka, the officer in charge of tolls are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē Odavida caḷu tiralumalli jagadē kanṛpaṁ
paduḷaṁ tāḷdida dhareyaṁ puduvi . svasti samastabhuvanā śrayaṁ
śrīpṟithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ para parama rakaṁnatyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ śrīmadrājadhāni kalyāṇada nele vīḍinoḷ
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmārādhakaṁ samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ vairibhayadāyakaṁ saṁnaddha
baddhavairikṛtāntaṁ parijanadigantaṁ karituragapaṭṭasāhaṇi kaḍitaverggaḍe sēnādhipati daṁḍanā
yakaṁ rēcarasar banavase paṁnircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ
baḷḷigrāmeya nelevīḍinoḷ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷdarasugeyyuttamire .
© śrīmaddvīpasamūhamaṁ miguva jaṁbūdvīpadoḷ kēvaṇaṁ tāmirddaṁteyo
luṁnatikkeverasirddā mēruviṁ teṁkaluddāmaṁ bhāratavarṣadalli nelasirkkuṁ kuṁta
ḷasthānavā kṣēmaṁ puṭṭida nāḍinalli banavāsidēśamaṁtoppugu . ka . banavase paṁni
rcchāsiramanitakkaṁ tiruḷakaṁpaṇaṁbāsavuraṁ manamosedunūṟanālvattenipadaṟoḷagagra
hāra hosavūresegu . mattamāgrāmada mahimōṁnatiyeṁtendaḍe . sutti
da naṁdanavanadiṁduttamada sugaṁdhaśāḷiyiṁ perggeṟeyiṁdettaṁ parimaḷagaṁdhaṁ ma
ttaṁ kaḍurayamenisi hosavūresegu . tāvareneydulgoḷadiṁdāvaga puṁnāganā
gacaṁpakavanadiṁ cāvaḷisuva sukapikadaḷigāvagaveḍanāytu suttaluṁ kaḍura
yya . dhareyoḷage yōgapīṭhaṁ piridadaṟiṁdamadhikameṁdu māḷacipīṭhaṁ berasudiyi sirdda de
yvaṁ surarellaṁ pogaḷvare paḍuḷidara pavaṇēnu . [I]daṁ janamējayanantuditō ditapuṇṇyameṁ
du manadakkaṟoḷaṁ viditaṁ sāsirbbarigaṁ paduḷisi dattiyane māḍidaṁ hosavūra .
vēdavinōdadalli sakaḷāgamatatvavicāradalli supā yalli nityaniyamōktigaḷalli
da māsamaṁgaḷaṁ davaṟalli manvaguṇadalli viśada padārtthadalli mattāda viriṁcareṁ
ba teṟadiṁ hosavūrina sadvijōttamaru . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasampannaruṁ śrīmāḷacidēvalabdhavara
prasādarumappa śrīmatujanamējayadatthiyagrahāraṁ deyvadahosavūraśēṣa mahājanaṁ sāsi
rbbar sarvvaveḷasaviṭhṭhāṇadoḷirddu catuḥsīmāṁtaraṁgaḷoḷāda sakaḷadharmmaṁgaḷaṁ taṁma dharmmameṁdā
raydu kāruṇyacittadiṁ surakṣitaṁ māḍi prajāpāḷaneyiṁdārayyuttamire . © Udayā
driyoḷādityanumudayaṁgeydante khacarakuḷadanvayadoḷ mudadinde puṭṭi negarddam viditam
maṁḍaḷika kaliyamarasaṁ dhareyoḷ . © svasti śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jaga
dēkamalladēvavarṣada 10 neya vibhavasaṁvatsarada puśyadamavāse Ādityavāramum
Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ sūryyagrahaṇamādā tithinimittadiṁ
kēcarasadaṁḍanāyakaru śrīmūḷacidēvige harakeyanoppisalu vēḍi Oṁdi
ddalli suṁkadadhikāri dēvadharadaṁḍanā ḷa Aśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa saṁni
dhānadoḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi tāraṁbaraṁ salvaṁtāgi biṭṭa vṛ(r)tti
grāmada staḷadalu hēṟuva maṁ dēviya nivēdya
naṁdādīvigege biṭṭaru . © śrīmādhavadē
varige . kōṇavattiya kalkeṟeya ya dēvaṁgēriya baḷḷigrāme sahita mahānāḍu nera
du dēviya parvvadalu dēvige biṭṭa dhaṁrmma voṭṭiliṁge hāga . grāmaṁ hiriya keṟege Ā ha
ḍuvagōḍiyalu nālku mattaru keyya biṭṭaru . mattaṁ gejjegeṟege Ā haḍuvagōḍi yalu nā
lku ma biṭṭaru . © hattettina mūle suṁkavaṁ dēviya Uyyala parvake biṭṭaru ©
kāvātaṁgiṣṭasiddhiyalladadēkeṁdāvaga meṇisuva ma
tegeyyuṁ teṟegeyyaṁdaṟiyade nuḍivaṁgamaThe continuation is peeled off.
Digital edition of SII 18.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
